description: Delay does not fit standard categories. May include: waiting for building work, planning permission, partner agreement, financial review, or other personal circumstances.

sub_categories.description: Waiting for building work, renovation, or refurbishment to complete
Waiting for partner or spouse agreement
Waiting for financial situation to stabilise
Waiting for planning permission or regulatory clearance

key_questions_to_ask: What specifically needs to happen before you can start?
What is the expected timeline for that?
Is there anything I can help with in the meantime?
Would it help to have the documents ready now?
what_to_do: Send relevant documents in advance to reduce friction at signing
follow_up_cadence: Monthly for most. Adjust based on urgency of specific blocker.

notable_leads.name: Kiran Kaur
notable_leads.note: Building confidence. No standard delay code. Patience required.

notable_leads.name: Vanessa
notable_leads.note: Betrayal-damaged. Needs trust rebuilding — that is the delay.

notable_leads.name: Martyn De Vere
notable_leads.note: Deeply betrayal-damaged. Time is the delay. Entry 058 is the updated version.
